mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders ( user_id, train_schedule_id, passenger_name, ticket_count, total_price, status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{trainScheduleId}, #{passengerName}, #{ticketCount}, #{totalPrice}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, train_schedule_id, passenger_name, ticket_count, total_price, status, create_time, update_time FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, user_id, train_schedule_id, passenger_name, ticket_count, total_price, status, create_time, update_time FROM orders WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update:
UPDATE orders
user_id = #{userId},
train_schedule_id = #{trainScheduleId},
passenger_name = #{passengerName},
ticket_count = #{ticketCount},
total_price = #{totalPrice},
status = #{status},
update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM route WHERE departure_station LIKE CONCAT('%', #{from}, '%') AND arrival_station LIKE CONCAT('%', #{to}, '%') ORDER BY id LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM route WHERE departure_station LIKE CONCAT('%', #{from}, '%') AND arrival_station LIKE CONCAT('%', #{to}, '%')

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, train_schedule_id AS trainScheduleId, passenger_name AS passengerName, ticket_count AS ticketCount, total_price AS totalPrice, status, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM orders ORDER BY create_time DESC
